Apple___Apple_scab.description: Fungal disease causing olive-green to brown spots on leaves and fruit.
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides (myclobutanil, captan). Remove fallen leaves and infected fruit.

Apple___Black_rot.description: Fungal disease causing purple spots on leaves and black rot on fruit.
Apple___Black_rot.treatment: Prune infected branches. Apply fungicides (captan, sulfur).

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.description: Fungal disease causing yellow-orange spots on leaves.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Remove juniper bushes near apple trees. Apply fungicides.

Apple___healthy.description: Healthy apple leaf – no disease detected.

Cherry___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur or potassium bicarbonate fungicides.

Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_sp.description: Grayish lesions on leaves; reduces photosynthesis.
Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_sp.treatment: Use resistant hybrids and rotate crops.

Corn___Common_rust.treatment: Plant resistant varieties. Apply fungicides if severe.

Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight.treatment: Use resistant hybrids, crop rotation, and fungicides.

Grape___Black_rot.description: Dark spots on leaves; fruit shrivels into black mummies.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).description: Brown-black streaks on leaves and fruit.
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: No effective cure. Remove infected vines.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.description: Small brown spots with yellow halos.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description: Yellow shoots, misshapen fruit, tree decline.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).treatment: No cure. Remove infected trees and control psyllids.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.description: Water-soaked lesions on leaves and fruit.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.description: Dark spots on leaves and fruit.
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Use disease-free seed. Apply copper-based bactericides.

Potato___Late_blight.description: Caused by Phytophthora infestans; leads to plant collapse.
Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Use certified disease-free seed potatoes. Apply copper-based fungicides.

Squash___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur or neem oil. Increase air circulation.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description: Dark, greasy spots on leaves and fruit.

Tomato___Early_blight.description: Dark concentric rings on lower leaves.
Tomato___Early_blight.treatment: Mulch to reduce soil splash. Apply chlorothalonil.

Tomato___Late_blight.description: Large, dark, water-soaked lesions on leaves and fruit.
Tomato___Late_blight.treatment: Remove infected plants. Apply copper-based fungicides.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.description: Yellow spots on upper surface; purple mold underneath.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.description: Small dark spots with light centers.

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.description: Tiny mites cause stippling and webbing.
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.treatment: Use insecticidal soap or horticultural oil.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.treatment: Use virus-free seeds. Remove infected plants.
